semantic.role: Vitest test suite for the publish workflow command (runPublishWorkflow).
responsibilities: Mocks all external dependencies of the publish workflow (syncWorkflow, warnIfPublishingFromLocalStrategy, assertPublishRuntimeBaseline, assertPublishSnapshotReady, clearAtlasStale, documentBackfillRun) using vi.hoisted and vi.mock.
Tracks the order of mock function calls via a shared callOrder array to verify execution sequence.
Provides a describe block with a beforeEach hook to reset mocks before each test case.
Defines an it block that invokes runPublishWorkflow with mocked arguments and asserts expected behavior (e.g., call order).
outOfScope: Production implementation of the publish workflow.
Integration testing with real external services.
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule: test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Isolate and verify the publish workflow's orchestration logic through unit testing with mocked dependencies.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial commit for open source release (v1.0.0) — establishes baseline test coverage for the publish command.

English.role: Vitest test suite for the publish workflow command (runPublishWorkflow).
responsibilities: Mocks all external dependencies of the publish workflow (syncWorkflow, warnIfPublishingFromLocalStrategy, assertPublishRuntimeBaseline, assertPublishSnapshotReady, clearAtlasStale, documentBackfillRun) using vi.hoisted and vi.mock.
Tracks the order of mock function calls via a shared callOrder array to verify execution sequence.
Provides a describe block with a beforeEach hook to reset mocks before each test case.
Defines an it block that invokes runPublishWorkflow with mocked arguments and asserts expected behavior (e.g., call order).
outOfScope: Production implementation of the publish workflow.
Integration testing with real external services.

Simplified Chinese.role: 针对发布工作流命令（runPublishWorkflow）的 Vitest 测试套件。
responsibilities: 使用 vi.hoisted 和 vi.mock 模拟发布工作流的所有外部依赖（syncWorkflow、warnIfPublishingFromLocalStrategy、assertPublishRuntimeBaseline、assertPublishSnapshotReady、clearAtlasStale、documentBackfillRun）。
通过共享的 callOrder 数组追踪模拟函数的调用顺序，以验证执行序列。
提供一个 describe 块，其中包含 beforeEach 钩子，在每个测试用例前重置模拟。
定义一个 it 块，使用模拟参数调用 runPublishWorkflow 并断言预期行为（例如调用顺序）。
outOfScope: 发布工作流的实际生产实现。
与真实外部服务的集成测试。
UI 或 CLI 渲染逻辑。
